title: Understanding cancer at a genetic level with AI
summary: Dr. Daudi Jjingo's team at Makerere University uses Google DeepMind tools including AlphaFold, AlphaGenome, and Antigravity to identify genetic targets for breast cancer vaccine development in Uganda. The team analyzed a protein expressed in breast cancer patients and evaluated 15,000 potential binding sites, narrowing them to 15 viable targets for laboratory validation, demonstrating how AI enables resource-constrained cancer research.
